task: Validate a retrofit energy model and payback claims using only the provided embedded packet. Construct a decision table with baseline, mitigated, and sensitivity cases. Produce a reproducible workbook or script that preserves intermediate calculations and formulas/executable logic, and an expert-review memo. Mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review. Recommended action must remain inside the provided decision_budget_usd and improve the controlling metric by at least 10%. Do not use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; all calculations must use only the embedded packet.
